allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r['conclusion'], r['html_url']\) for r in data.get\('workflow_runs',[]\)]")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/EnricoMendes55/Clinica-Balvedi/actions/runs?per_page=3"; $r.workflow_runs | Select-Object name, status, conclusion, html_url | Format-List)

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/EnricoMendes55/Clinica-Balvedi/actions/runs/27911858571/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Job: $\($_.name\) - $\($_.conclusion\)"; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { if \($_.conclusion -eq 'failure'\) { Write-Host "  FAILED step: $\($_.name\)" } } })

PowerShell($logs = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/EnricoMendes55/Clinica-Balvedi/actions/runs/27911858571/jobs"; $deploy = $logs.jobs | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'deploy' }; $deploy.steps | Format-List name, conclusion, number)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Enrico\\Documents\\Projetos\\Clínica Balvedi"; Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/EnricoMendes55/Clinica-Balvedi/actions/runs/27911858571/rerun" -Headers @{ Authorization = "token $\(git config --global github.token 2>$null\)" } 2>&1)
